name: Raging Slayers Rivals Deck
plot:
(Errata update) While using this Rivals deck, you can use the following abilities:

Raging Charge: Immediately after picking a friendly fighter to Charge or picking a friendly fighter to Attack if they already had a Charge token at the start of the turn, you can give that fighter and/or another friendly fighter in the same territory each a Rage token Fighters with any Rage tokens are enraged.

Raging Strike: After you make an Attack roll as part of a melee Attack for an enraged friendly fighter, you can immediately change one successful result to a Critical Attack ( {icon:crit} ) result.

Poor Footing: You must use this immediately after an enraged friendly fighter was Attacked if that fighter was not driven back or grappled. Push the target 1 hex away from the attacker Your opponent chooses the direction of that push.

Remove all Rage tokens from enraged friendly fighters at the end of the battle round.

cards.name: Aggressive Expansion
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if 3 or more enraged friendly fighters are in enemy territory.

cards.name: Best Foot Forward
cards.text: Score this immediately after a friendly fighter's successful Attack if that fighter has any Charge tokens and is in enemy territory.

cards.name: Blinded by Rage
cards.text: Score this immediately after an enemy fighter is slain by an enraged friendly fighter's melee Attack if that friendly fighter was enraged at the start of the turn.

cards.name: Coordinated Assault
cards.text: Score this immediately after an Action step if each friendly fighter is enraged and in enemy territory.

cards.name: Into the Fire
cards.text: (Errata update) Score this in an end phase if your leader is in enemy territory and within 2 hexes of 2 or more other fighters.

cards.name: No Contest
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if an enemy leader is slain.

cards.name: No Escape
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if each friendly fighter is enraged and in enemy territory, and no enemy fighters are in your territory.

cards.name: No Respite
cards.text: Score this immediately after an opponent's Action step if there is an enraged friendly fighter in each territory.

cards.name: Overwhelming Presence
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if each friendly fighter is enraged and there are no fighters holding treasure tokens.

cards.name: Sever the Head
cards.text: Score this immediately after an enemy leader is slain by an enraged friendly fighter's melee Attack.

cards.name: Supreme Slayer
cards.text: Score this immediately after your leader's successful Attack if the target was slain and that was the second or subsequent fighter slain by your leader.

cards.name: Unrelenting Massacre
cards.text: Score this in an end phase if all fighters have Charge tokens.

cards.name: Adrenaline Rush
cards.text: Pick up to 2 enraged friendly fighters. Remove their Stagger tokens.

cards.name: Honed Reflexes
cards.text: Domain: Each time you make a Save roll for an enraged friendly fighter, you can re-roll 1 Save dice in that Save roll. This effect persists until the end of the battle round or until another Domain card is played.

cards.name: Knife to the Heart
cards.text: Pick an enemy fighter that is not vulnerable and that is adjacent to an enraged friendly fighter. Inflict 1 damage on that enemy fighter. Then, remove that friendly fighter's Rage tokens.

cards.name: Murderlust
cards.text: Play this immediately after an enraged friendly fighter's melee Attack fails. Friendly fighters' melee weapons have +1 Attack dice while targeting the target of that failed Attack until the end of the battle round.

cards.name: Senseless Haste
cards.text: Friendly fighters have +1 Move in the next turn. After any friendly fighters Move in your next turn, give that fighter a Stagger token.

cards.name: Slayer's Aid
cards.text: Pick an enraged friendly fighter. Push that fighter up to 3 hexes. That push must end adjacent to your leader.

cards.name: Slayer's Arena
cards.text: Domain: After each failed Attack, give the attacker a Stagger token. This effect persists until the end of the battle round or until another Domain card is played.

cards.name: Venting Strike
cards.text: Play this immediately after you pick a melee weapon as part of an Attack made by an enraged friendly fighter. That weapon has +1 Attack dice for that Attack. Immediately after that Attack, remove that fighter's Rage tokens.

cards.name: What Pain?
cards.text: Pick up to 2 enraged friendly fighters. Heal those fighters. Then, remove their Rage tokens and give them a Stagger token.

cards.name: Wrong-footed Stance
cards.text: Domain: If a fighter enters or is placed in a stagger hex, give them a Move token in addition to a Stagger token. This effect persists until the end of the battle round or until another Domain card is played.

cards.name: Agile
cards.text: Deft: After you make a Save roll for this fighter, you can immediately re-roll 1 Save dice in that Save roll.

cards.name: Aggressive Ambusher
cards.text: While this fighter is enraged, their melee weapons have Cleave and Ensnare if the target is Flanked and/or Surrounded.

cards.name: Angered Swing
cards.text:
Melee Attack action
{icon:hex} 1 {icon:sword} 3 {icon:damage} 2
A fighter can only use this weapon while enraged. When using the Raging Strike ability with this weapon, you must re-roll each Attack dice instead.

cards.name: Assured Bloodshed
cards.text: While this fighter is enraged, their melee weapons have Grapple and Brutal.

cards.name: Gifted Vitality
cards.text: Heal this fighter at the end of each battle round.

cards.name: Haymaker
cards.text:
This fighter's melee weapons (excluding Upgrades) have the Lethal Weapon ability. After this fighter make a successful Attack with Lethal, discard this card.
Lethal: That fighter's weapon has +2 Damage for that Attack, to a maximum of 4.

cards.name: Keen Eye
cards.text: This fighter's melee weapons have +1 Attack dice.

cards.name: Murderous Instincts
cards.text:
This fighter's Range 1 melee weapons (excluding Upgrades) have Grievous.
This fighter cannot use Core abilities other than the Charge ability.

cards.name: Stubborn to the Bone
cards.text: While this fighter is enraged, this fighter cannot be pushed or given Stagger tokens.

cards.name: United in Anger
cards.text: Rally Together: Immediately after an enraged friendly fighter is pushed, you can push this fighter up to 1 hex closer to that fighter.
